article.title: Cyberreality: Industrial Ambient Electronic Production
article.subtitle: Textured noise constructions and spatial sound design define this experimental artist.
article.author: L. Nakamura
article.excerpt: Cyberreality operates at the intersection of industrial, ambient, and electronic music, crafting textured noise constructions and spatial sound design across several notable releases.

content.text: Cyberreality is an artist working across industrial, ambient, and electronic production. Their output is characterized by textured noise constructions and spatial sound design, establishing a distinct presence within experimental electronic music.

The artist's discography includes several key albums such as CYBERROR, r e c u e r d o, and Internet Dating 1.5. These releases demonstrate a consistent exploration of complex sonic environments and detailed production techniques.

Cyberreality's work is further contextualized by their appearance on the compilation Selected Juke Werkz, Vol. 1. This placement situates them within a broader network of experimental electronic artists and scenes.

Recent releases include CYBERROR (Remixes) from early 2022, followed by r e c u e r d o in January 2022 and the original CYBERROR album in mid-2021. Earlier work such as Internet Dating 1.5 dates back to late 2020.

The artist is identified with the HYPERBASS tag, indicating a specific technical or stylistic focus within their electronic productions. Their approach remains firmly rooted in experimental sound design and noise-based compositions.
